title: A Hidden Plan Advances
description: On pages 17–18, this part focuses on a hidden plan advances, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Hidden Plan Advances. The Straw Hats are trapped beneath Rain Dinners as Crocodile prepares to drown them and erase the kingdom’s last hope. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: This is quite a tame task for a final mission...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Was there ever any mission that we didn't find easy?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I just can't calm down unless I have this on.

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: What'd ya all think of my "Kingly" perfor- mance?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: It was the best, Mr. 2 Bon Kurei!

summary: This part develops a hidden plan advances and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
